notes: a removable jumper/link in the battery-positive path (E40) — physically pulled out rather than flipped, but electrically (and in run mode) it plays the same on/off role as a physical switch.
description: A removable link: pull it out and the robot is provably dead, with nothing to flip or trust to actually be off. A common alternative to a physical switch on antweights — same tech-check requirement (E40), same role in the circuit.
